title: polypodium viscidum
intro: Polypodium viscidum, also known as the sticky polypody or black shield fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. Traditionally, Polypodium viscidum has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Polypodium viscidum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried powder, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
